mapper.select: SELECT * FROM fitness_plan WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM fitness_plan WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_active = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fitness_plan (user_id, plan_name, plan_type, split_type, is_active) VALUES (#{userId}, #{planName}, #{planType}, #{splitType}, #{isActive})
mapper.update: UPDATE fitness_plan SET is_active = 0 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
